title: CycloRamaDrome
collaboration: Interactive video installation by Alexandra Dementieva
description:
Software development in MaxMSP to duplicate and animate twelve clips of actors filmed on a treadmill
                            / A Kinect allows to track the visitors presence inside the ring
                            / MadMapper for edge blending of the 3 projectors covering a 360º circular projection screen
longDescription:
Software development in MaxMSP to duplicate and animate twelve clips of actors filmed on a treadmill
                            / A Kinect allows to track the visitors presence inside the ring
                            / MadMapper for edge blending of the 3 projectors covering a 360º circular projection screen
